description: Exact Terraform entry template for Kafka-to-Iceberg Glue job in locals.tf glue_jobs map

glue_version.note: 5.1 is the current standard as confirmed in saptcc/locals.tf

trigger_schedule.note: Only add if scheduling mode is 'scheduled'. Comment out if manual.

--source_kafka_endpoint.note: References Kafka bootstrap endpoint map in locals.tf, keyed by env

--source_kafka_topic.note: Uses Terraform ${local.env} interpolation: '${local.env}.{source_system}.{schema_grain}.raw'. Written LITERALLY in HCL — not expanded by Python.

--sink_transformer1_schema_registry_endp.note: References schema registry endpoint map in locals.tf, keyed by env

--sink_iceberg_catalog_id.note: AWS account ID for the Glue catalog, referenced from locals.tf env map

--sink_iceberg_checkpoint_dir.note: FIXED PATTERN — always this value. Uses Terraform ${local.env} interpolation. Never user-provided.

--sink_iceberg_assume_role_arn.note: ARN of IAM role to assume for cross-account Iceberg writes

output_template_hcl:
"{{job_key}}" = {
    job_type     = "{{job_type}}"
    job_version  = "{{job_version}}"
    glue_version = "{{glue_version}}"
{{trigger_schedule_line}}
    number_of_workers = {{number_of_workers}}
    worker_type       = "{{worker_type}}"
    stop_before_start = true

    glue_job_arguments = {
      "--source"                   = "kafka"
      "--source_kafka_endpoint"    = local.kafka_bootstrap_endpoint[local.env]
      "--source_kafka_secret_name" = "minerva-${local.env}-corp-mif-{{source_system}}-gluejob-sa-cc-api-creds"
      "--source_kafka_topic"       = "${local.env}.{{source_system}}.{{schema_grain}}.raw"

      "--transformer1"              = "timestamp"
      "--transformer1_column"       = "processing_timestamp"
      "--transformer1_value_format" = "json"

      "--transformer2"                 = "kafka_unpack"
      "--transformer2_metadata_column" = "__metadata__"

      "--sink_transformer1"                          = "kafka_split"
      "--sink_transformer1_schema_registry_endpoint" = local.schema_registry_endpoint[local.env]
      "--sink_transformer1_secret_name"              = "minerva-${local.env}-corp-mif-{{source_system}}-gluejob-sa-cc-api-creds"

      "--sink"                             = "iceberg"
      "--sink_iceberg_catalog_type"        = "glue"
      "--sink_iceberg_catalog_id"          = local.miw_account_id[local.env]
      "--sink_iceberg_database"            = "{{iceberg_database}}"
      "--sink_iceberg_warehouse"           = "{{iceberg_warehouse}}"
      "--sink_iceberg_checkpoint_dir"      = "s3://minerva-${local.env}-glue-checkpoints/checkpoints/unified/"
      "--sink_iceberg_assume_role_arn"     = "{{assume_role_arn}}"
      "--sink_iceberg_assume_session_name" = "mif-glue-iceberg"

      "--sink_trigger" = "availableNow"
    }
  }

output_template_notes.dollar_local_env: ${local.env} is a Terraform interpolation written LITERALLY in generated HCL — Python does NOT expand it
output_template_notes.ent_func_subgroup: ent_func and subgroup are FILE-LEVEL locals at top of locals.tf — NOT inside individual job blocks
output_template_notes.trigger_schedule_line: {{trigger_schedule_line}} renders as '    trigger_schedule  = "cron(...)"' only when scheduling_mode=scheduled, otherwise empty string
output_template_notes.glue_tf: glue.tf uses for_each = local.glue_jobs — it NEVER needs to change when adding jobs to EXISTING source systems
output_template_notes.files_for_existing_system: Only locals.tf needs modification for existing source systems
output_template_notes.files_for_new_system: Both locals.tf AND glue.tf must be created for new source systems, plus .vela.py registration

checkpoint_dir.note: ${local.env} is a Terraform interpolation — written literally in HCL output

ent_func_subgroup.location: FILE-LEVEL locals block, NOT inside glue_jobs job entries
ent_func_subgroup.note: Only needed when creating a NEW source system folder
